translator.name: The Holy Qur'an
translator.license: Public-domain English translation (as distributed by the Tanzil Project). If sourced from Tanzil, include Tanzil's translation licence notice and a link to tanzil.net.
translator.attribution: Abdullah Yusuf Ali, The Holy Qur'an: Text, Translation and Commentary (1934).
translator.note: SAMPLE renderings — verify against an authoritative source file (e.g. Tanzil) before shipping the full Qur'an.

verses.1:1: In the name of Allah, Most Gracious, Most Merciful.
verses.1:2: Praise be to Allah, the Cherisher and Sustainer of the Worlds;
verses.1:4: Master of the Day of Judgment.
verses.1:5: Thee do we worship, and Thine aid we seek.
verses.1:7: The way of those on whom Thou hast bestowed Thy Grace, those whose (portion) is not wrath, and who go not astray.
